caption: The video shows a news broadcast featuring a man in a light-colored Nehru jacket and glasses, who is standing and pressing his palms together in a namaste gesture. He is positioned behind a white table with a microphone and other equipment. To his left and right are smaller inset portrait photos of other men, with accompanying text labels including "सबरात चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". The background is a dark blue screen with the text "Project" partially visible. Across the top of the screen is a yellow banner with the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". A red news ticker at the bottom reads "PM मोदी ने ट्वीट कर नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी", alongside a "MAHAREKHA" logo and a timestamp of "10:09 PM". The scene remains static across the frames, with only very slight changes in the man's posture and facial expression.
